infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Lav uses your location only when you tap "Use my location", to find nearby bathrooms. Lav never stores or shares your live location.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Lav needs access to your photos so you can attach a picture to a bathroom submission or review.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Lav uses your location only when you tap "Use my location", to find nearby bathrooms. Lav never stores or shares your live location.

plugins.photosPermission: Lav needs access to your photos so you can attach a picture to a bathroom submission or review.
